title: Email follow-up
subtitle: Write after a meeting or request with clarity.
duolingoBridge: B1 Med trains native-style but level-appropriate French: natural chunks, connected answers, listening strategy, and practical output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: refer to a previous exchange.
Knowledge point 2: state action and deadline.

items.fr: Suite à notre échange, je vous confirme que je suis disponible jeudi.
items.en: Following our exchange, I confirm that I am available on Thursday.
items.es: Tras nuestro intercambio, le confirmo que estoy disponible el jueves.

items.fr: Comme convenu, je vous envoie le document en pièce jointe.
items.en: As agreed, I am sending you the document as an attachment.
items.es: Como acordado, le envío el documento adjunto.

items.fr: Vous trouverez ci-joint la version corrigée du projet.
items.en: You will find attached the corrected version of the project.
items.es: Encontrará adjunta la versión corregida del proyecto.

items.fr: Je pourrai ajouter les derniers détails d’ici vendredi.
items.en: I will be able to add the final details by Friday.
items.es: Podré añadir los últimos detalles antes del viernes.

items.fr: N’hésitez pas à me dire si vous souhaitez des modifications.
items.en: Do not hesitate to tell me if you would like changes.
items.es: No dude en decirme si desea modificaciones.
